title: salix cordata var. discolor
intro: Salix cordata var. discolor, also known as the white willow, is a plant species in the willow family with distinctive white or pale yellow bark. The medicinal properties of Salix cordata var. discolor lie in its salicin content, a natural pain-reliever similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and alleviating headaches. Herbal preparations of Salix cordata var. discolor can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
